steps.title: Translate the constraint into an equation
steps.content:
Mina needs at least 120 signatures total. She has 68. We need to find the minimum number of additional signatures she requires.

If she has 68 and needs at least 120, then:
$$68 + x \geq 120$$
where $x$ is the number of additional signatures.

steps.title: Solve for the minimum additional signatures
steps.content:
For the minimum, we set the inequality to equality (she needs exactly 120 at minimum):
$$68 + x = 120$$
$$x = 120 - 68 = 52$$
Therefore, Mina needs exactly 52 additional signatures to reach the 120-signature minimum. That matches Choice C — 52.
